title: The Council of El: The Father of Gods
description: El, the father of the gods, presides over the divine assembly at the source of the two rivers — the Canaanite prototype of Psalm 82.
introduction: El, the father of the gods, presides over the divine assembly at the source of the two rivers — the Canaanite prototype of Psalm 82.

translation.text: El sat at the source of the two rivers, in the midst of the fountains of the two deeps.
